conservative.name: I'm Done Toying With You
conservative.requirements: Fencing weapon, hand weapon, or dagger equipped, engaged with target. Weapon Skill & Coordination trained

success.description: You hit the target for normal damage, +1 damage per critical wound he is suffering from
You hit the target for normal damage, plus additional damage equal to the total severity of his critical wounds

boon.description: You may immediately perform a manoeuvre for free

sigmarsComet.description: The target suffers wounds equal to the severity of his most severe critical

reckless.name: I'm Done Toying With You
reckless.requirements: Fencing weapon, hand weapon, or dagger equipped, engaged with target. Weapon Skill & Coordination Trained

success.description: You hit the target for normal damage
You hit the target for normal damage, plus additional damage equal to the severity of his most severe critical

boon.description: The target suffers wounds equal to the severity of his most severe critical

sigmarsComet.description: The target suffers fatigue and stress equal to the severity of his most severe critical
